insanity.description: Danger lurks around every corner, in every shadow.... No raids until you have at least a few bodies to repel them, but after that they'll come for you relentlessly....

insanity_buff.description: Raids become stronger by Gamedays. Enemys have increased health, armor and damage

naked_and_afraid.description: A lone wanderer, with nothing but the clothes on their back.
naked_and_afraid.tooltip: No starting items, work for what you need. An impossible loadout to start with.

deserter.description: Having abandoned the army, you have only what you carried into battle, and some meager rations.
deserter.tooltip: Start with some low level combat gear and food. A hard loadout to start with.

pilgrim.description: Your local Church of Plenty has sanctioned your pilgrimmage to the chapel of Cid in the capital of the Ascendancy. Unfortunately, your journey has been cut short out of necessity.
pilgrim.tooltip: A start with a bedroll and a few belongings. A hard loadout to start with.

thief.description: Living on the streets and out of others pockets, you were finally caught and forced to flee.
thief.tooltip: A very challenging start. No items, but a bit of gold. A very hard loadout to start with.

full_backpacks.description: A collection of food and wood for your lone wanderer to start fresh. Progress may be slow and dangerous, but feel quite rewarding.
full_backpacks.tooltip: A balanced start for a lone wanderer.

sleeping_bag.description: The perfect tool for the roving adventurer.

sleeping_bag_recipe.description: A handy sleeping sack for intrepid adventuring types.
